_provenance: Long-word keys ("fortitude"/"reflex"/"will") match how human.json itself writes alternate_traits[].bonus[].id for type="save", and race.schema.json's bonusEffect enum. NOTE: this is inconsistent with the rest of the app, which mostly uses short keys (fort/ref/will, e.g. sfCalc.js save_fort/save_ref/save_will, CharacterSheet.jsx labels). Kept as long words here because that's what the hand-authored race reference already does -- if a later category needs to interoperate with the app's short-key convention, that's a deliberate translation point, not a bug.
